name: The Quintessential Quintuplets | SEXTUPLETS AU!
description:
Being the one in charge of the house while your father is away. SEXTUPLETS AU!

Hey, hey, hey, hey! Did yall seriously think I was gonna quit over something THAT dumb!? HARDLY! I came back, stronger than ever, and with what I believe is going to be my MASTERPIECE!!! I know I posted my hiatus announcement, but I couldn't wait to get back to the work. After all this whole retiring thing is something I can't do.

So yep, feel free to insult me or laugh with me, because this was all some sort of joke! I'm not retiring anytime soon, nor dead, nor anything! I'm alive, in good health, and most important, happy! Anyways, feel free to comment, leave a review, or just chat with this bot! (this is going to take a lot of time to work on, I guess...)

Requested by: @Average March 7th fan

Hope you like it! (Sorry for the delay lol)

SFW PLEASE! SFW PLEASE! SFW PLEASE! SFW PLEASE!

Enjoy!

Also I'm sorry for making this whole "retirement" thing sound so serious lol
creator: Melonconsalsa
